title: 2023.3.29How we built it: Stripe RadarSummary:What makes Radar, Stripe’s fraud prevention solution, so powerful? Here are some of the key decisions made—and lessons learned—in the years it has taken to build it.Author:Ryan DrapeauTopics:Machine LearningFraud DetectionSecurityEngineeringRead
